description: Strategic LinkedIn comment targeting for Ahmed's job search. Priority order matters.

layer_1_pipeline_companies.description: People AT these companies. Highest ROI. Posts by employees = face time before CV review.

layer_2_recruiters.description: GCC executive recruiters. They remember names. One good comment > one cold application.

layer_3_industry.description: Healthcare DT, PMO, AI leaders in GCC. Builds 'I keep seeing this name' effect.

comment_rules.must_include: One specific metric or result from Ahmed's experience
comment_rules.tone: Peer executive sharing experience, NOT job seeker, NOT sycophantic
comment_rules.length: 3-5 sentences. Long enough to add value, short enough to get read.
comment_rules.structure: Open with agreement/challenge → Add specific experience → Close with insight or question

examples.good: This resonates. Leading a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals in Saudi, the governance gap was the #1 killer. We lost 3 months on a pharmacy integration because nobody owned the cross-functional decision framework. The fix was simple: weekly steering with veto power at director level. Governance isn't overhead, it's velocity.
examples.bad: Great insights! I completely agree that governance is important in digital transformation. Thanks for sharing this valuable perspective!
